description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: In cases of very mild "slippery slope" breaches of the Alignment Conserver requirements, a formal warning may be given and recorded in the subdocuments herein. Where such a breach was the first instance of misalignment by the Alignment Conserver, no disciplinary measures beyond a formal warning are required.
description: Delete `A.1.4.9.2.1 - Warnings Appropriate For Mild Breach` and its subdocuments and supporting documents. Add a new subdocument of `A.1.4.9.2 - Imposing Appropriate Penalty`. This document should be located directly before `A.1.4.9.2.2 - Mandated Derecognition For Severe Breaches` and its supporting documents to read as follows: Graduated Response Framework For Breaches By Aligned Delegates *(Core)* - In cases of breaches of the Alignment Conserver requirements by Aligned Delegates, the Graduated Response Framework specified in Graduated Response Framework should be applied.
